sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41030" key="e)pistigmh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιστιγμή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n41030.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">point</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dot upon</tr_> a thing, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:31:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">31.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
